items.title: Still getting a barrage of Buddy Hield questions...
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Still getting a barrage of Buddy Hield questions...

1) I'm almost as surprised as you are that he's still on the team at the guaranteed number near $10 mill

2) Chatter has been pretty quiet after the first few hours. Possible that something they thought was close fell through.

items.title: With Buddy Hield on the books at his full $9.6M salary, the Atlanta Hawks are roughly $7.1M under the luxury tax and $15.1M under the first apron. The Hawks have one open roster spot.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With Buddy Hield on the books at his full $9.6M salary, the Atlanta Hawks are roughly $7.1M under the luxury tax and $15.1M under the first apron. The Hawks have one open roster spot.

This factors in the Aaron Wiggins trade, plus both first-round draft picks.

items.title: I'm told the Hawks will keep Buddy Hield on the roster passed his non-guarantee deadline tonight. @mikeascotto.bsky.social had the news first.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
I'm told the Hawks will keep Buddy Hield on the roster passed his non-guarantee deadline tonight. @mikeascotto.bsky.social had the news first.

This will guarantee Hield's salary (roughly $9.6 million) for the 2026-27 season.

TBD on if the Hawks plan to keep him or have a trade lined up.

items.title: The Atlanta Hawks will fully guarantee the $9.66 million salary for Buddy Hield, league sources told HoopsHype. Hield is a career 39.5 percent 3-point shooter.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Atlanta Hawks will fully guarantee the $9.66 million salary for Buddy Hield, league sources told HoopsHype. Hield is a career 39.5 percent 3-point shooter.

items.title: Hawks, Buddy Hield Agree To Push Back Guarantee Date
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Hawks, Buddy Hield Agree To Push Back Guarantee Date Hoops Rumors Gueye option picked up, Hield guarantee date pushed back Peachtree Hoops Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is … Yahoo Sports Buddy Hield, Hawks Push Back Guarantee Date On $9.7M Contract RealGM Bud

items.title: Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is June 28th.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Per source, the new guarantee date for Buddy Hield is June 28th.

Hield and the Hawks mutually agreed to move it back yesterday from the original date of June 25th.

(Reminder: Hield is already owed $3 million guaranteed on his ~$9.6 million deal for 2026-27)

items.title: Barring an amendment to push the deadline back, Buddy Hield's contract with the Atlanta Hawks will become fully guaranteed at $9.6M if he's not waived today.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Barring an amendment to push the deadline back, Buddy Hield's contract with the Atlanta Hawks will become fully guaranteed at $9.6M if he's not waived today.

Hield's deal is already partially guaranteed for $3M.

items.title: Buddy Hield’s contract will guarantee at the end of tonight if he’s still on the Hawks roster.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Buddy Hield’s contract will guarantee at the end of tonight if he’s still on the Hawks roster.

I’ll be surprised if he’s not either traded or waived by then.

items.title: 11th pick Yaxel Lendeborg is 23 years old, and will be 24 by the start of the NBA season. 18 players 23 years or older have been selected in the top 20 picks since 2000, 11 of which were in the lottery, and the best of them is Cam Johnson or Buddy Hield
items.author: Pickleskennedy1
items.body_excerpt: The list is as follows: Melvin Ely (12th overall pick) (5.3 points per game for his career, going to use that as an imperfect but somewhat telling baseline) Ekpe Udoh (6th pick) (3.5 points per game) Chris Duarte (13th pick) (7.6 points, out of league in four years) Rafael…
